title: Social Fund alignment payments (crisis loans) research
body: "This report details the findings generated by a small-scale qualitative research project undertaken to gain an understanding of the motivations and experience of customers applying for a Social Fund alignment payment.   Crisis Loans are not available any more. If you need help with emergency household costs, you may be able to get help through:   a Budgeting Advance if you’re getting Universal Credit a Budgeting Loan if you’re getting other benefits   "
